name: Hedge End North

locations.name: Eastleigh
locations.description: Hedge End Police Station is not open to the public, the nearest front counters are Portswood Police Station Or Southampton Central

description:
The parishes of Hedge End, West End and Botley make up the Hedge End North area.

The area has many primary schools which feed into the largest secondary school in Hampshire, Wildern School and a new secondary school for the area Deer Park. We have good relationships with all of our schools and work closely with them.
